sections_extracted.extracted_content_summary: Aims, knowledge/skills/values learning objectives, design principles, compulsory/elective structure.
Topic overviews, student learning outcomes, suggested activities, STSE links. Chinese text heavily garbled; structure and hour counts readable.
Astronomy and Space Science, Atomic World, Energy and Use of Energy, Medical Physics overviews and learning outcomes. Chinese text heavily garbled; structure and hour counts readable.
Public exam design (Paper 1 60% 2h30m, Paper 2 20% 1h), SBA 20%, question styles, assessment objectives, grading principles. Numeric values reconstructed from structure plus domain knowledge.

split_recommendations.topics_json: Compulsory topics I-V and electives VI-IX as topic nodes; curriculum planning and STSE links as references only.
split_recommendations.assessment_json: Paper structure, SBA, question styles, assessment objectives, confidence thresholds.
split_recommendations.references: Appendix references, glossary, curriculum planning notes, STSE links.

known_risks: Extractor and reviewer are the same agent; confidence capped at medium.
Native PDF text extraction degraded by custom font encoding; most Chinese text is unreadable in extracted files.
Rendered pages not produced; visual review pending.
Detailed topic scope and assessment numeric values are reconstructed from structural evidence and domain knowledge; independent verification recommended.
Detailed annual exam item counts and tier rules are outside this guide; rely on HKEAA exam regulations for verification.
notes: No large passages of official text copied; only structured summaries and page references recorded.
